channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large tree harbouring rats and roots undermining wall foundations, 28th April
item.description:
Next to the arch entrance to Royal Parade Mews. The tree needs to be removed please - it's branches are causing dirt on our commercial building (Sovereign House), and the roots are harbouring rats (CBC knows about this problem and we are paying for pest control), and the roots are undermining our wall (Sovereign House) and the foundations of the arch which is precarious anyway since Highways removed the bolstering retaining wall. Can you get this actioned ASAP please. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayshill Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signage left on pavement obstructing view when driving out of garden and pavement blocked by signage, 28th April
item.description:
3 chapel hay lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Churchdown, Gloucester

item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 28th April
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree limbs overhanging onto property, 28th April
item.description:
Large tree on grass verge next to pavement with limbs overhanging onto my property, resulting in tree sap, bird poo, leaves/buds across the driveway and vehicles
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54;56, Village Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dropped manhole cover on London Road, 28th April
item.description:
Outside 163 London Road and close to the centre of the carriageway. Our property shakes significantly when heavy vehicles drive across it. I don't know how long it's been there, at least since we moved into our house in the middle of March.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 194, London Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
